[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001011111 7
1 1101111111 9
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0001101001 4
6 0101101011 6
7 0000001101 3

01 10 0001101001 4 match 5
12 21 0000001001 2
23 32 0000000000 a match 2 3 4
34 43 1000100000 2
45 54 0010000000 1
56 65 0001001000 2
67 76 1001011111 7 match 0
70 07 0001101001 4 match 5

02 20 0000001001 2
13 31 0001100000 2
24 42 0000000000 a match 2 3 4
35 53 0001000000 1

57 75 0001001000 2

71 17 0101101011 6 match 6

14 41 0100100010 3

47 74 1100100010 4
50 05 0001001000 2
61 16 0001001011 4
72 27 0000001101 3 match 7

26 62 0000001101 3 match 7
37 73 1001100000 3
